/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/spmm_bell.dir/src/main_bell.cu.o -o spmm_bell  /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcusparse.so /usr/local/cuda-12.5/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.5/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
